# ghost — Project Crystal
<!-- Generated by claude-kernel session-2026-04-17T16-30-00Z -->

# CRYSTAL.md

## Stack:
- Rust
- windows crate 0.58
- Win32 UIA
- Win32 SendInput
- Win32 DataExchange
- DXGI
- tokio
- serde_json
- MCP JSON-RPC

## Key Files:
- `Cargo.toml`: Added necessary features for Win32 libraries.
- `crates/ghost-core/src/input/keyboard.rs`: Implemented key_down, key_up, and name_to_vk functions.
- `crates/ghost-core/src/input/mouse.rs`: Added hover, right_click, double_click, drag, and scroll functionalities.
- `crates/ghost-core/src/system/clipboard.rs`: Introduced new clipboard module with global lock null check fix.
- `crates/ghost-core/src/uia/element.rs`: Enhanced ElementDescriptor for interactive roles and text retrieval.
- `crates/ghost-core/src/uia/tree.rs`: Improved WindowInfo, WindowState, list_windows, focus_window, set_window_state, and describe_screen functions.
- `crates/ghost-session/src/session.rs`: Expanded with 17 new async methods to support 24 tools.
- `examples/diagnose.rs`: Updated to be generic across all tools.

## Patterns:
- Additive development: Clean fit into existing crate structure without introducing new crates.
- LLM-agnostic design: All tool parameters as plain strings/numbers for MCP compatibility.
- Per-task spec and quality review gates.

## Decisions:
- Described_screen uses depth<=20 and count<=200 to prevent UIA tree traversal issues.
- get_clipboard returns empty string when clipboard is empty, simplifying agent handling.
- scroll() uses string direction ('up'/'down'/'left'/'right') for MCP JSON-RPC ergonomics.
- hotkey() releases modifiers in reverse order for correct Win32 behavior.
- name_to_vk covers A-Z, 0-9, F1-F12, arrows, modifiers, special keys case-insensitively.

## Gotchas:
- diagnose.rs was task-specific (Gmail + VS Code hardcoded), replaced with tool-category verifier against Notepad.
